steps.title: Read the trend
steps.content: The scatterplot shows $y$ increasing as $x$ increases, so the linear model should have a positive slope.

steps.title: Use the intercept
steps.content:
The line should also have a negative $y$-intercept, so the model needs the form
$$
y=-14.7+10x
$$
among the choices.

steps.title: Match the model
steps.content: Choice D is the only listed equation with the matching intercept and slope pattern for the data shown. The answer is D.
